summary: Adds Phase 1 self-update support, better cache management visibility, and release plumbing refinements.
highlights: New reserve update apply command for macOS and Linux
Dry-run and force modes for safe live-path updater testing
Windows update flow now prints exact manual download targets
New reserve cache path command for active database discovery
Cache stats now includes schema version and on-disk database size
Updater and cache-management coverage expanded in command tests
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
